rationale: User-reported linker/build error with CMake configuration; no spec behavior involved.
Null pointer dereference in legacy C++ driver internal methods; implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
CI build failure due to deprecated libmongoc API usage; build/compilation issue, no spec behavior.
Missing UNREACHABLE macro in json.cpp causing build failure; internal code issue, not spec-related.
SFINAE protection missing on b_regex/b_codewscope constructors; C++ language binding issue, not a spec rule violation.
GCC 6 compiler warning -Wignored-attributes in test mocking infrastructure; build/compilation issue.
Test fails with MMAPv1 storage engine due to system.indexes being returned; test environment issue, not spec behavior.
Removing deprecated API usage in test files; internal code quality improvement, no spec conformance issue.
BSON spec requires regex flags be alphabetically ordered; driver violates this requirement. Depends on DRIVERS-331.
Documentation improvement for installation polyfill option; no spec behavior involved.
API deprecation of frame destructor; internal API design change, no spec rule involved.
Element search stops early due to missing string length check; implementation bug in BSON iteration, no specific spec rule cited.
Bad link in documentation markdown file; doc typo fix.
Using deprecated mongoc_collection_get_last_error; internal library migration, no spec rule involved.
GCC 7 false positive maybe-uninitialized warning in user-facing header; compiler warning fix, no spec behavior.
Copy constructor bug in insert_many result holding dangling references; internal C++ implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
endSessions command format changed per spec; driver sending wrong parameters. Depends on DRIVERS-427.
Adding noexcept to move constructors/assignment operators; internal C++ code quality, no spec behavior.
Null return from mongoc_uri_new_with_error not checked; internal defensive coding, no specific spec rule violated.
Migrating off deprecated libmongoc APIs; internal dependency update, no spec behavior involved.
CMake GNUInstallDirs adoption for installation paths; build system improvement, no spec behavior.
Build C driver with CMake on Evergreen CI; build/CI infrastructure change, no spec behavior.
Wrong parameter order in b_timestamp constructor; internal C++ API bug. BSON spec doesn't define constructor argument order.
Spec change to decrease implicit session leaks; driver implementing updated sessions spec requirement. Depends on DRIVERS-453.
batch_size/use_cursor broken by libmongoc 1.9 internal change; libmongoc API compatibility bug, not a spec rule violation.
Switching to mongoc_collection_find_and_modify_with_opts; internal refactor for better API alignment, no spec rule contradicted.
Adopting libmongoc with_opts bulk operation functions; internal API migration, no spec behavior change.
Kerberos hostname canonicalization algorithm update per spec (SPEC-1040, DRIVERS-465); spec-required behavior change.
Upgrading to C driver 1.10; dependency version bump, no spec behavior.
Migrating from deprecated mongoc_cursor_new_from_command_reply; internal API migration, no spec rule violated.
Documentation improvement showing mongocxx::pool usage in thread-safety docs; doc enhancement.
Performance optimization using bson_iter_w_len functions to avoid strlen calls; perf improvement, no spec behavior.
Client constructor crashes when SSL options set before _impl initialized; internal initialization ordering bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Avoiding direct bson_iter_t struct access; internal implementation refactor for correctness/performance, no spec rule.
Spec change requires only sending bypassDocumentValidation when true; driver must follow updated spec. Depends on DRIVERS-450.
CRUD spec says ordered defaults to false; driver explicitly sets ordered=false in delete_many etc., confirmed by command monitoring tests.
Fail points not cleaned up in index_view tests; test hygiene issue, not a spec conformance problem.
Porting session tests to use C++ command monitoring API instead of private libmongoc API; internal test refactor.
Retryable writes spec updated to consider more errors retryable; driver must implement new spec rules. Depends on DRIVERS-467.
Deprecating snapshot option per spec change (SPEC-1033, DRIVERS-454); proactive spec rollout, not a bug. Issuetype is Improvement.
string_view::to_string not in STL standard; C++ API compatibility fix, no spec behavior involved.
Migrating from deprecated libmongoc 1.12 functions; internal API migration, no spec conformance issue.
Removing previously deprecated database::modify_collection API; API cleanup, no spec behavior.
Updating spec test format for bulk writes YAML structure; test infrastructure update driven by DRIVERS-480.
GCC 4.9.3 compilation error with max_align_t in test file; build/compiler compatibility issue.
Removing options::aggregate::use_cursor that became obsolete; API cleanup following libmongoc changes.
Adding backtrace logging to Evergreen test failures; CI/test tooling improvement, no spec behavior.
Rewriting contributing page on website; documentation fix, no spec behavior.
Refactoring create_collection API to accept flexible BSON options; API design improvement, not a spec violation.
Bumping required libbson/libmongoc version to 1.13.0; dependency version requirement update, no spec behavior.
